title: Oviedo Engineering
content:

|founding=[[Standard year/Legends|Years]] before<ref name="CSWE" /> [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref>
|dissolved=Around [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]<ref name="Date">The events of "[[Honor Bound]]," which include [[Lorca Oviedo]]'s [[Death/Legends|death]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], are set approximately a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the events of {{Film|II}} and therefore around [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref>
|affiliation=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]<ref name="Tales" />
}}
{{Quote|You will return in triumph! A hero of the Republic! The illustrious Lorca Oviedo—Director General of the Oviedo Engineering dynasty.|Foreman Wat Tambor, to Director General Lorca Oviedo|<ref name="Tales" />}}
'''Oviedo Engineering''' was a large research-and-development organization that manufactured military vehicles and [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]] systems. Led by [[Director General]] [[Lorca Oviedo]], it expanded its corporate portfolio [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. Around [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Oviedo allied himself with the Confederacy.

While Oviedo traveled to the Republic's [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], his [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]] and [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] escorts were shot down by Separatist forces over the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Asturias]], crashing on the moon. While the Director General spoke with Separatist [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]] via [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]], planning to return to the Republic and use its [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate's]] [[Republic military enhancement bill/Legends|rearmament bill]] to task his industries with equipping the Republic's [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Army]] with weaponry, the commandos [[Action on Asturias|captured]] Oviedo. They brought him to Coruscant, where he [[Death/Legends|died]] of respiratory failure. The Director General's [[Treason/Legends|treason]] resulted in the dismantling of Oviedo Engineering's operations.

==Description==
{{Quote|Your fealty no longer in doubt, the Senate will pass its rearmament mandate and charge your industries with equipping its Grand Army with the latest vehicles and munitions.|Foreman Wat Tambor, to Director General Lorca Oviedo|<ref name="Tales" />}}
Oviedo Engineering was a vast research-and-development organization that manufactured military vehicles and [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]] systems.<ref name="CSWE" />

==History==
{{Quote|One other thing. Should there be even the remotest possibility of them getting off-world, kill Director Oviedo immediately…his silence will be of greater worth than his complicity.|Foreman Wat Tambor, to his battle droid forces|<ref name="Tales" />}}
[[File:Lorca_Oviedo.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Director General Lorca Oviedo led Oviedo Engineering.]]
Oviedo Engineering was founded [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a conflict between the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],<ref name="CIS">{{DB|organization|cis|Confederacy of Independent Systems}}</ref> of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC" /> expanding its corporate portfolio and producing various military vehicles and weapon systems under<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Director General]] [[Lorca Oviedo]]'s leadership.<ref name="Tales" /> Around [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> Oviedo allied himself with the Confederacy, plotting to use the Republic [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate's]] [[Republic military enhancement bill/Legends|rearmament bill]] to task his industries with equipping the government's [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] with the latest military vehicles and munitions. Separatist<ref name="Tales" /> [[Foreman/Legends|Foreman]]<ref name="BF">''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]''</ref> [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]] sought to use the assignment to extrapolate the [[Army/Legends|army's]] strength and deployment patterns to ambush the military's [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] forces.<ref name="Tales" />

After Oviedo Engineering's [[Director/Legends|director]] attended a [[conference on Aviles Prime|conference]] on the<ref name="Tales" /> [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]<ref name="EAOC-Aviles">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Aviles Prime system/Legends|Aviles Prime system]]</ref> astronomical object [[Aviles Prime]], the Director General traveled to the Republic's<ref name="Tales" /> [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]],<ref name="Coruscant">{{DB|location|coruscant|Coruscant}}</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. While en route to the planet, Oviedo's [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]] and its [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] escorts dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] over the<ref name="Tales" /> Expansion Region<ref name="EAOC-Asturias">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Asturias system/Legends|Asturias system]]</ref> [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Asturias]]. A group of Separatist forces then [[Action on Asturias|attacked]] the [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] and its escorts, sending them crashing down to the moon.<ref name="Tales" />

After surviving the crash, Oviedo, surrounded by Separatist [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], met with Tambor via [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]]; however, the [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] attacked the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] forces and captured the Director General. The Separatist foreman [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] the droids to leave no survivors and [[Death/Legends|kill]] Oviedo if the commandos had the slightest chance of leaving Asturias, for he believed that the director's silence was of greater worth than his complicity. However, the [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] left Asturias aboard the Consular cruiser with the director, bringing him to Coruscant. The Director General died of respiratory failure after arriving there,<ref name="Tales" /> and Oviedo Engineering's operations were dismantled as a result of Oviedo's [[Treason/Legends|treason]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==Staff==
Director General Oviedo was the organization's director.<ref name="Tales" />

==Behind the scenes==
Oviedo Engineering first appeared in the flashbacks of [[Ian Edginton]]'s [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story "[[Honor Bound]]," which was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="Tales" /> on [[February 23]], [[2005]]<ref name="DH">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/10-154/Star-Wars-Tales-22|text=STAR WARS TALES #22}}</ref> as part of the [[Star Wars Tales 22|twenty-second]] issue of the ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' comic-book series.<ref name="Tales" /> The organization shares its name with<ref name="Tales" /> [[Wikipedia:Oviedo|Oviedo]], the capital city of the<ref name="VisitaOviedo">{{WebCite|url=https://www.visitoviedo.info|text=Visita Oviedo - oviedo.es|work=[https://www.visitoviedo.info/home Visit Oviedo]|language=[[Wikipedia:Spanish language|Spanish]]|archivedate=20220305141646 }}</ref> [[Wikipedia:Spain|Spanish]] region<ref name="Dict">{{WebCite|url=https://www.collinsdictionary.com/es/diccionario/ingles/asturias|text=Asturias definición y significado|work=[[Wikipedia:Collins Dictionary|Collins Dictionary]]|language=[[Wikipedia:Spanish language|Spanish]]|archivedate=20161022104544}}</ref> of [[Wikipedia:Asturias|Asturias]].<ref name="VisitaOviedo" />
